ref: I am the Lord! There is nothing too difficult for me. I'll come back next year at the time I promised, and Sarah will already have a son.”
text: Ɖe nane sesẽ na Yehowa? Le ƒe, si gbɔna ƒe woleawoɣi la, magato ava gbɔwò, eye ŋutsuvi anɔ Sara si.
translated: What is Jehovah's name? Yes, it is a wonderful name, and it is a name that brings comfort, and it is a name that is precious to Sarah.

ref: The third one was born when Judah was in Chezib, and she named him Shelah.
text: Emegbe la egadzi ŋutsuvi, eye wòna ŋkɔe bena Sela. Enɔ Kesib hafi dzii.
translated: The woman went to the farm, and she found Sela there. He was working on the farm.

ref: “I'll name the boy Joseph, and I'll pray that the Lord will give me another son.” Jacob and Laban
text: Eyata wòna ŋkɔe be Yosef; elabena egblɔ be: Yehowa agatsɔ ŋutsuvi bubu akpee nam. Yakob ƒe kesinɔnuwo.
translated: Joseph was a faithful servant of Jehovah, a righteous man. He was a descendant of Jacob.

ref: Before the end of the day, Laban had separated his spotted and speckled animals and the black lambs from the others and had put his sons in charge of them.
text: Gbemagbe ke wòɖe gbɔ̃tsu, siwo me fli to, kple esiwo tso kpɔ, kple gbɔ̃nɔ, siwo katã le ŋɔtaŋɔta, kple esiwo tso kpɔ — lã sia lã, si me ɣi to — kpakple alẽvi, siwo le yibɔ la, ɖe vovo, eye wòde wo asi na viawo.
translated: When a person is sick, they should be taken care of, given medicine, and fed, and their bed should be made comfortable, and they should be given water to drink — little by little, as they can take it — and they should be kept warm, and their surroundings should be clean, and they should be comforted.

ref: That night they got their father drunk, and the older daughter got in bed with him, but he was too drunk even to know she was there.
text: Tete wona wein wo fofo le zã ma me wono, eye tsitsitɔ yi ɖamlɔ fofoa gbɔ; ke eya menya naneke le eƒe egbɔ mɔmlɔ kple fɔfɔdzo ŋuti o.
translated: That person is very good, and he is helping us a lot. He is the one who brought us peace and development.
